name: Scott Owens
bio: Scott Owens serves as the Mayor of Gladewater, known as the 'Antique Capital of East Texas.' Located in Gregg County, Gladewater has a rich oil history and vibrant downtown. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to maintain the city's unique character.
campaignPromises: Promote Gladewater's antique district and tourism
Improve city infrastructure and water systems
Support local businesses and economic growth
Maintain public safety and community services
